reasoning: Quinoclamine (2-amino-3-chloro-1,4-naphthoquinone) is a naphthoquinone derivative featuring a naphthalene ring system with two ketone groups at the 1 and 4 positions, an amino group at position 2, and a chloro substituent at position 3. It is best classified as a naphthoquinone within the naphthalene superstructure.
